visual_summary: A demo of the Progressive Blur effect with a ScrollArea component. It displays a list of items with a blurred area at the bottom. Use when you want to create a visually appealing effect that draws attention to the bottom of a list or container.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready demo component with the following characteristics:

Name: Progressive Blur Demo
Description: A demo of the Progressive Blur effect with a ScrollArea component. It displays a list of items with a blurred area at the bottom. Use when you want to create a visually appealing effect that draws attention to the bottom of a list or container.
Style: rounded, bordered, animated
Interactions: none
Tags: magicui, blur, scroll, animation

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
